content.text: Frame generation inserts generated frames between rendered frames for smoother animation and lower perceived latency.
Changes take effect after restarting the game.

content.help: Enables generated frames when the required runtime dependencies are available. Changes take effect after restart.
Selects the frame generation backend. Auto follows the upscale method preference from the Upscaler menu. Changes take effect after restart. (Default: Auto)
Caps the base render framerate when frame generation is active and VSync is disabled. Changes take effect after restart.
